subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! This first day of the Festival hath been made blessed through the righteous and steadfast deeds of His Majesty Sultan Abdul-Hamid, may God strengthen him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد یوم اول عید بمبارکی اعمال صحیحه مستقیمه حضرت سلطان عبد الحمید ایده الله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
